title: Assistant Store Manager - Amazon Books India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Amazon Books India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!
